summary: Iteration 10: Comprehensive testing of People's Councils system. All 34 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified all council features including list view, detail view, 4 tabs (discussions, votes, news, nominations), legal consent in create modal, confirmation progress bars, and AI moderation labels on news.

issues: Minor React hydration warning about <span> inside <select> - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

passed_tests: BACKEND: GET /api/councils/levels - Returns all council levels (yard, district, city, republic, country)
BACKEND: GET /api/councils - Lists councils without auth
BACKEND: GET /api/councils?level=yard - Filters councils by level
BACKEND: POST /api/councils - Creates council with valid data
BACKEND: GET /api/councils/{id} - Returns 404 for non-existent council
BACKEND: POST /api/councils/{id}/confirm - Works with verified user
BACKEND: POST /api/councils/{id}/news - Requires chairman/rep role, includes AI check
BACKEND: POST /api/councils/{id}/complaint - Files complaint against representative
FRONTEND: /councils page loads with 'Народные Советы' title
FRONTEND: Level filters visible (Все, Дворовый, Районный, Городской, Республиканский, Народный)
FRONTEND: Create council button opens modal
FRONTEND: Create modal has legal consent checkbox and block
FRONTEND: Council list shows councils with confirmation progress bars
FRONTEND: Council detail view opens with all tabs
FRONTEND: Discussions tab shows discussions with reply counts
FRONTEND: Votes tab shows voting with percentages
FRONTEND: News tab shows news with AI moderation labels (Достоверно, Подозрительно)
FRONTEND: Nominations tab shows nominations with vote counts
FRONTEND: Confirmation progress bar shows X/10 confirmations
FRONTEND: Chairman badge visible for council creator
critical_code_review_comments: Council creation requires legal_consent=true - properly enforced
Council confirmation requires verification level 2+ (passport verified)
Chairman cannot leave council - must transfer role first
Only chairman/representatives can create votes and news
AI moderation using emergentintegrations with gpt-4o-mini returns credibility scores
News shows AI labels: high (Достоверно), medium (Требует проверки), low (Подозрительно), fake (Дезинформация)
seed_data_creation: Used existing test councils and users from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 tested all People's Councils features: CRUD operations, join/leave, discussions, votes, news with AI moderation, nominations, elections, and complaints. All 34 backend tests passed. Frontend verified with Playwright - all tabs working, AI labels showing correctly on news, legal consent in create modal. Test tokens: User1 (WRANhsgZEBRoK2GSyIUvBEaqIWo0YtmhTsICy2Y4cPc) is chairman of council_1bfec18f1635, User2 (qaiAgO3W1YY2ZRN-5c2wk2BrNaGBNVE_rfYAxlye9cI) has verification level 2.

frontend_components.councils_page: List view with level filters and create button
